hook: Most people think supplements are the best way to reduce inflammation. The evidence says otherwise.

script.hook: Food, not supplements, is your best defense against inflammation.
beats: Chronic inflammation can lead to serious health issues, but diet plays a crucial role in managing it.
Fatty fish, like salmon and sardines, are rich in omega-3s, which help turn off inflammation.
However, individual responses to dietary changes can vary, so consult your healthcare provider.
script.close: Follow BestKarma for science-backed health without the hype.
